review_criteria: Verify that V0.6 is explicitly defined as a new version iteration, not a patch or amendment to V0.5.
Verify that the V0.5 carry-overs (Path Resolution Fragility, Reviewer Output Delivery, Approval Gating Automation) are explicitly imported into the V0.6 scope.
Verify that the scope includes repository structure cleanup, docs center creation, 1-click install/bootstrap scripts, and a comparative analysis with 'labs-teamwork-spec'.
Verify that M5 (Repository Normalization) and M6 (Installability/Bootstrap/Comparison) are explicitly and mandatorily scheduled in the Milestone Map.
Verify that the kickoff phase strictly performed NO execution, implementation, or file modifications (other than creating the kickoff artifacts).
Verify that workflow state transitions adhere to the gate discipline (i.e., this review must be approved before advancing).
